synopsis: HARROO! RHOO AAHH! HRRG!!! (Translation: It's a Chewbacca-centric special issue as Chewie fights to rescue his friend Han.) HRRARRARGH AAHHRA HUGGG! (Translation: Guest-starring the one-and-only Krrsantan!) RRRAHARRR RAAA HRRRA! (Translation: You don't want to miss this one!)
title: Han Solo & Chewbacca #04
